name: Mondo Spam Deluxe on Rye
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Spam by slicing it into 4 slabs.
2. Lay out the slices of "Beefsteak" Rye bread.
3. Spread a thin layer of Miracle Whip on one side of each rye slice.
4. Add a generous amount of Vidalia Onion Mustard and Horseradish to taste.
5. Sprinkle the Cole Slaw over the mustard mixture.
6. Place 4 lettuce leaves, 1 thick slice of tomato, 2 quartered dill pickle spears, and 1 slab of sharp cheddar cheese on top.
7. Add 2 thick slices of Bermuda onion.
8. Pour a (2 liter) Coke over the assembled components.
9. Serve immediately and enjoy with a napkin and glass.
